diagram_title: 工具 輸入 normalization pipeline

activities.label: Receive raw LLM 工具-呼叫 args
activities.description: AI SDK stream 解析出 tool-call event，包含 tool name、callID、raw arguments object（LLM 產生，可能 noncompliant）
controls: provider-specific transport (OpenAI Responses API / Anthropic API)

activities.label: 解析 & normalize 透過 zod schema
activities.description: Tool.define wrapper 呼叫 parameters.parse(raw)；z.preprocess/z.transform/z.default 於此階段執行；成功回傳 parsed value，失敗丟 ZodError
controls: DD-1: wrapper uses parse return value

activities.label: Execute 工具 使用 parsed args
activities.description: Tool handler 實作（如 QuestionTool）收到 parsed args 跑業務邏輯；例如 QuestionTool 呼叫 Question.ask(sessionID, questions, tool, abort)
controls: tool-specific invariants (QuestionTool: questions must be array)

activities.label: 持久化 工具 part 狀態.輸入
activities.description: Processor 在 tool-result / tool-error 時寫入 session 存檔；completed 用 ToolRegistry 查 schema safeParse 存 normalized；error 保留 raw

activities.label: 渲染 工具 part 使用 defensive normalize
activities.description: UI 讀 state.input 前先過 Question.normalize helper；兼容舊 session 的 raw shape 與新 session 的 normalized shape
outputs: QuestionDock / message-part / TUI session rendered UI
explicit error UI on un-normalizable input
controls: DD-2: single source of truth normalize helper
AGENTS.md 第一條: no silent fallback

activities.label: Classify 輸入 shape
activities.description: Determine whether 輸入 是 null / primitive / flat single-問題 / canonical multi-問題 / unknown

activities.label: Wrap flat 進入 array
activities.description: If flat single-問題 { 問題, options, multiple }, wrap 進入 { questions: [normalizeSingle(輸入)] }

activities.label: Normalize each 問題 (依-item)
activities.description: 供 each 問題: auto-fill header if 缺失; coerce options (string → {label, description}; {value, detail|explanation} → {label, description})

activities.label: Validate against zod schema
activities.description: After preprocess, outer z.object validates canonical shape; 拋出 zod錯誤 在 violation
